strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms like AWS
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Strong open-source contributions and developer tooling expertise, including testing frameworks and CI/CD systems
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kubernetes in resume despite being core to the role
No clear evidence of direct experience with Kotlin, Java, or Python in enterprise automation contexts
German language proficiency is listed as basic, which may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based teams
response.justification: The candidate brings deep full-stack expertise, strong AI-agent experience, and a history of building scalable, test-driven systems — aligning well with the role’s core needs, though gaps in specified stack tools and language proficiency raise moderate concerns.
